brief.rationale: Body includes a banned cliche ('tantalize your taste buds') — should fail banned_cliche only.

email.subject_b: Maya's tandoori cauliflower — early access tonight
email.body: Maya's tandoori cauliflower steak will tantalize your taste buds, {{first_name}} — smoke, char, coconut-yogurt finish. Not a kit. Just dinner — already cooked by a James Beard alum. Two minutes to plate. [Add to plan]({{short_url}})

sms.body: Hey {{first_name}} — Maya's tandoori cauliflower steak just landed. Tap → {{short_url}}

push.title: Maya's cauliflower steak just landed
push.body: Tap to add it before Sunday's cutoff.
